Who I Am

About Me

I'm a final-year B.Pharm student at DIT University with a deep passion for pharmaceutical sciences, particularly in industrial drug manufacturing and quality assurance. My academic journey has been complemented by real-world exposure in both hospital and industrial pharmaceutical settings.

From formulating herbal drug delivery systems to developing AI-powered pharmacovigilance tools, I thrive at the intersection of science and innovation. I bring a collaborative mindset, meticulous attention to GMP compliance, and a natural curiosity for research.

I am also a creative soul — writing shayari, poetry, and ghazals — and believe that the same precision that makes a good formulation also makes a great verse.

Featured Research Project

VigiTrack 2.0

Final Year Research Project AI-Driven Pharmacovigilance Platform

VigiTrack 2.0 is an infovigilance-based early signal detection system designed for monitoring adverse events associated with next-generation vaccines through social media intelligence. The platform utilizes Natural Language Processing (NLP), contextual filtering, sentiment analysis, and medical terminology mapping to identify potential safety signals before they are captured through traditional pharmacovigilance channels.

Research Area Pharmacovigilance & Infovigilance
Technologies NLP, AI, Signal Detection
Application Vaccine Safety Monitoring
Medical Standards MedDRA, ICD-10, SNOMED CT
Research Work

Projects

🤖
VigiTrack 2.0: AI-Powered Infovigilance App
Jan 2026 – Apr 2026  |  Team of 2

An AI-driven web application for early detection of vaccine-related adverse events via social media. Leverages NLP and signal detection algorithms to process unstructured, multilingual inputs and convert them into standardised medical terminologies (MedDRA, ICD-10, SNOMED CT). Features regional language translation (Hindi/Hinglish) for inclusive pharmacovigilance.

NLPPharmacovigilance PythonSignal Detection
Mentor: Dr. Amit Kumar Dubey
🌿
Herbal Anti-Cholesterol & Anti-Diabetic Delivery Systems
Aug 2025 – Dec 2025  |  Team of 5

Formulated and evaluated herbal drug delivery systems using Clitoria ternatea (Aparajita), including an anti-diabetic transdermal patch and an anti-hypercholesterolemic capsule. Involved extraction of bioactive constituents, formulation development, and evaluation of drug release, stability, and physicochemical parameters.

Herbal PharmacyDrug Delivery Formulation
Mentor: Mrs. Vibhooti
🧪
Polyherbal Gargle for Throat Infection
Sep 2023 – May 2024  |  Team of 5

Developed a polyherbal gargle formulation using extracts of Clitoria ternatea, Ginkgo biloba, and wild Black Forest honey to manage bacterial throat infections. Evaluated physicochemical parameters, stability, and antimicrobial activity, demonstrating suitability as a natural therapeutic alternative.

AntimicrobialHerbal Extracts Stability Testing
Mentor: Dr. Amit Kumar Dubey
